# PERF-175 negative: a select-based receive
lang: go
file: PERF-175-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "time"

func Receive(ch chan int, done <-chan struct{}) (int, bool) {
	select {
	case v := <-ch:
		return v, true
	case <-done:
		return 0, false
	case <-time.After(time.Second):
		return 0, false
	}
}
